# Now or Never Magazine

> Now or Never Magazine is a limited-edition print publication documenting Thailand's cannabis culture through first-person reporting, expert interviews, and original photography. Founded by Phonotype_247, a Thailand-based cannabis culture journalist and photographer. Issue 1 was published in November 2024 with only 420 copies printed.
> Last updated: 2026-05-23

## About the Publication
- Publisher: Now or Never Magazine (Bangkok, Thailand)
- Author: Phonotype_247 — cannabis culture journalist, photographer, and grower based in Thailand
- Languages: Thai (primary), English
- Contact: info@nowornevermagazine.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nowornevermagazine/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/Now-or-Never/61578822662304/

## Issue 1 — Stories (Published November 2024)

### Now or Never 1st Issue
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/now-or-never-1st-issue
- Summary: Introduction to the magazine exploring cannabis culture from perspectives in Thailand never seen before.

### The Root of Everything
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/the-root-of-everything
- Summary: Behind-the-scenes account of creating the magazine — the research process, attention to detail, and editorial vision that shaped Issue 1.

### Through the Lens
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/through-the-lens
- Summary: The author's dual perspective as both a cannabis grower and photographer, exploring how the camera captures what words cannot about Thai cannabis culture.

### The Beginning
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/the-beginning
- Summary: The origin story of the magazine — six chapters, each with its own flavor, built from months of field interviews across Bangkok, Koh Pha-ngan, and southern Thailand.

### The Journey Under the Waves
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/the-journey-under-the-waves
- Summary: An eyewitness account of Thailand's 2024 cannabis protests. The author attended the demonstrations against re-criminalization and interviewed protesters, growers, and advocates on the ground. First-person English-language reporting from inside the 2024 Bangkok cannabis protests.

### The Green Awakening
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/article/the-green-awakening
- Summary: Reflections on the resilience of Thailand's cannabis community and the cultural awakening that cannabis legalization sparked across the country.

## Shop
- URL: https://www.nowornevermagazine.com/shop
- Product: Now or Never Magazine Issue 1 — Limited edition, 420 copies, ฿1420 THB
- Shipping: Thailand

## Key People Featured in Issue 1
The magazine features interviews with 14 figures in Thailand's cannabis culture, including Ko Dam Koh Tao (cannabis pioneer, KD strain creator), Dr.K Highthai (cannabis education advocate), and Boss Kasta (community builder).

## Topics Covered
- Thai cannabis culture and history
- Thailand's 2022 cannabis decriminalization and 2024-2025 re-criminalization debate
- Cannabis growers in southern Thailand (Koh Pha-ngan, Surat Thani, Koh Tao)
- Cannabis and Thai Buddhism
- Cannabis photography and visual storytelling
- Thai landrace sativa genetics
- Organic cannabis farming in Thailand
